_comment: Default-value reference for run_arch_ssd_band_rrs.py — §9.2 architecture-aligned structured-mask/SSD experiment on band-RRS sampled contexts. Mirrors ArchSSDBandRRSConfig. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; CLI flags override. Plan ref: EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §9.2. Theorem refs: thesis/theorem_a.txt Proposition 3 (SSD realization) and thesis/theorem_c.txt Proposition 4 (grouped closure). First architecture-tier script that exercises G2 sampled-context mode.
